creator: dgeo@dgeos.net
text:
This panic occurred four times in one month. (with -p6 also) I'm not able to understand where it comes from, but this may help others...
	I think this could be ipv6 (nd6_output) related...
	core dumps, kernel.debug and kgdb log are there:
	http://www.dgeos.net/core/

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: 	I don't see any particular load on this server...
	I could test some patch on it for stability
